title: Quantitative proteomics in cardiovascular research: global and targeted strategies.
author: Shen X Young R Canty JM Qu J
content: S-EPMC4159306 PMC4159306 Quantitative proteomics in cardiovascular research: global and targeted strategies. Extensive technical advances in the past decade have substantially expanded quantitative proteomics in cardiovascular research. This has great promise for elucidating the mechanisms
